rulings.Case Title: COLBY LAM VS. ANDREW KENNY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday Aug 2, 2018 line 1. DEFENDANT M-J SF INVESTMENTS, LLC, JAMES NUNEMACHER, THE BANNER DEVELOPMENT COMPANY, A CALIFORNIA, MICHAEL CASSIDY, BRIDGET HARTY-CASSIDY DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer based on CCP 337.15 is overruled. Moving party failed to show that this statute is applicable to personal injury claims. To the extent moving party attempts to advance a new argument regarding 2-year statute of limitations in reply (not mentioned in the Notice of Demurrer, Demurrer or Points and Authorities in Support of Demurrer), such argument is untimely and improper. Demurrer is otherwise sustained with leave to amend to allege each element of each cause of action as to each moving defendant or to allege facts in support of alter ego and agency vis-as-vis each of the moving defendants. Conclusory allegations are not sufficient. All amendments to be underlined. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHRISTINE A. BENNETT VS. THOMAS LUCAS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday Aug 2, 2018 line 2. DEFENDANT THOMAS LUCAS, TRUSTEE DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED without leave to amend. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)
